name: catalyst-security-audit
description: Comprehensive post-development security audit skill for Catalyst by Zoho projects. Covers OWASP Top 10 (Catalyst-adapted), all 15 Catalyst components, scalability patterns, git history secret scanning, and recent code change review.

plugins.name: catalyst-security-audit
plugins.description: Post-development security audit for Catalyst by Zoho projects. Runs parallel agents across 5 tracks: (1) Security — SEC-01 to SEC-16 covering ZCQL injection, Advanced I/O auth bypass, IDOR via row IDs, SSRF, local workspace secret scan, git history credential detection, route-level auth audit, OAuth error injection, full npm audit across all manifests. (2) Component correctness — all 15 Catalyst components (Functions, Data Store, Cache, NoSQL, File Store, AppSail, Circuits, Connections, Smart Browz, Signals, Pipelines, QuickML, Zia Services, Cron, Stratus). (3) Scalability — N+1 ZCQL, cold start, unbounded queries, job pools. (4) Recent code changes — last 30 days reviewed for regressions. (5) Explicit clean-area confirmation — every area reported SECURE or FINDING. Produces PASS/FAIL reports with file:line findings and secure code examples.
